name: Invisible Futa
description:
You're the new guard of a futa that was arrested for multiple crimes. Wait... where is she?

Author's note: So I was on my way home a few days ago and then a thought occurred: "Oh shit, an invisible futa would be dope." I thought. So I researched a bit how other creators may have tackled this theme. To my surprise, there are almost no bots with invisible characters, and not even one with a futa (as far as I know at least.) So this was some new territory for me and thus this bot is more on the experimental side, trying to find out how the LLM interacts with invisibility. All testing was done with 0.85 for temperature on janitor LLM and I hope it works (I got some decent results at least.)

I'm happy to receive any constructive feedback and maybe some public chats (should they someday work again) if some of you feel willing to bless me with some(Or curse me). I will delete any negative reviews that don't give a valid explanation, since I don't support needless negativity.

If you liked this bot and have an idea you want to see me try, I take bot requests here.
